mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 'A' AS userSe FROM CMS_USER_ADMIN UNION ALL SELECT 'E' AS userSe FROM CMS_USER_TASK UNION ALL SELECT 'G' AS userSe FROM CMS_USER )
AND userSe = #{userSe}

SELECT USER_ID AS id , 'A' AS userSe , USER_NM AS userNm , EML AS eml , MTELNO AS mtelno , GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , TELNO AS telno , ADDR AS addr , DADDR AS daddr , ADM_STS_SE AS stsSe , AUTH_EXP_YMD AS authExpYmd , AUTH_GRNT_YMD AS authGrntYmd , AUTH_RVK_SE AS authRvkSe , CI AS ci , DI AS di FROM CMS_USER_ADMIN WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT USER_ID AS id , 'E' AS userSe , USER_NM AS userNm , EML AS eml , MTELNO AS mtelno , GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , TELNO AS telno , ADDR AS addr , DADDR AS daddr , USER_STS_SE AS stsSe , AUTH_EXP_YMD AS authExpYmd , AUTH_GRNT_YMD AS authGrntYmd , AUTH_RVK_SE AS authRvkSe , CI AS ci , DI AS di FROM CMS_USER_TASK WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT USER_ID AS id , 'G' AS userSe , USER_NM AS userNm , EML AS eml , MTELNO AS mtelno , GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , TELNO AS telno , ADDR AS addr , DADDR AS daddr , ZIP AS zip , USER_STS_SE AS stsSe , CI AS ci , DI AS di FROM CMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
